events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Search] [Copilot Search] Copilot Chat available when using Copilot Search
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): [Copilot Search] [Copilot Search] Copilot Chat available when using Copilot Search
events.summary: Copilot Chat will be available for Microsoft 365 Copilot users from the side pane on the right-hand side when using Copilot Search in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app. This allows users to engage with Copilot while browsing universal search without switching pages or losing context.
events.summaryJa: Copilot Chat will be available for Microsoft 365 Copilot users from the side pane on the right-hand side when using Copilot Search in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app. This allows users to engage with Copilot while browsing universal search without switching pages or losing context.
events.summaryEn: Copilot Chat will be available for Microsoft 365 Copilot users from the side pane on the right-hand side when using Copilot Search in the Microsoft 365 Copilot app. This allows users to engage with Copilot while browsing universal search without switching pages or losing context.
events.importanceReason: 今後の展開計画や事前準備に影響するため / 管理やガバナンスへの影響が大きいため

events.title: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create Excel spreadsheets from Copilot Notebooks
events.titleJa: Copilot Notebooks から Excel 作成に対応
events.titleEn: Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365): Create Excel spreadsheets from Copilot Notebooks
events.summary: Copilot Notebooks allows users to generate Excel spreadsheets using the content and references gathered in a notebook. Copilot drafts a structured spreadsheet grounded in the notebook’s context, which can be opened and edited in Excel, helping users move from ideas and source material to a ready‑to‑use spreadsheet wit...

events.title: SharePoint: Lists as a knowledge source for agents in SharePoint and OneDrive
events.titleJa: SharePoint と OneDrive の Lists を agent の知識ソースに対応
events.titleEn: SharePoint: Lists as a knowledge source for agents in SharePoint and OneDrive
events.summary: We’re introducing support for Microsoft Lists as a knowledge source for custom agents in SharePoint and OneDrive. These custom agents can now ground responses in a list stored on a SharePoint site or your OneDrive.
events.summaryJa: We’re introducing support for Microsoft Lists as a knowledge source for custom agents in SharePoint and OneDrive. These custom agents can now ground responses in a list stored on a SharePoint site or your OneDrive.
events.summaryEn: We’re introducing support for Microsoft Lists as a knowledge source for custom agents in SharePoint and OneDrive. These custom agents can now ground responses in a list stored on a SharePoint site or your OneDrive.

events.title: Microsoft Teams: Slash commands for apps
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.titleEn: Microsoft Teams: Slash commands for apps
events.summary: You can now interact with your favorite apps directly from Teams chat and channels compose box using slash commands. Type / and start interacting with Apps and Agents, invoke workflows and more.
events.summaryJa: You can now interact with your favorite apps directly from Teams chat and channels compose box using slash commands. Type / and start interacting with Apps and Agents, invoke workflows and more.

events.title: Microsoft Teams: Attendant Agent
events.titleJa: Microsoft 365 Copilot の会議・チャット機能を更新
events.summary: Add conversational intelligence to your phone communications to ensure every customer gets served no matter what time of day - even after hours and holidays. Microsoft Teams Phone Attendant Agent greets callers, answers common questions, schedules appointments, and routes calls to the right person or department with c...

events.title: SharePoint: Extending AI in SharePoint using custom skills
events.titleJa: SharePoint で custom skills による AI 拡張に対応
events.titleEn: SharePoint: Extending AI in SharePoint using custom skills
events.summary: Skills allow extensibility of the SharePoint AI Agent, enabling customizable solutions that adapt to unique business needs. They address gaps in out-of-the-box functionality for unique business processes and enable reusable multi-step workflows.
events.summaryJa: Skills allow extensibility of the SharePoint AI Agent, enabling customizable solutions that adapt to unique business needs. They address gaps in out-of-the-box functionality for unique business processes and enable reusable multi-step workflows.

events.titleEn: Microsoft SharePoint: New web part for FAQs
